Package
Description
net.sourceforge.plantuml.gantt
Provides classes used to manage Gantt Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.gantt.ngm
Provides the core domain model for the New Gantt Model (NGM).
net.sourceforge.plantuml.gantt.ngm.math

  • Classes in net.sourceforge.plantuml.gantt.ngm used by net.sourceforge.plantuml.gantt
    Class
    Description
    NGMTotalEffort
    Represents the intrinsic amount of work required for a task, expressed internally as seconds of person-time.
  • Classes in net.sourceforge.plantuml.gantt.ngm used by net.sourceforge.plantuml.gantt.ngm
    Class
    Description
    NGMAllocation
    Represents the resource allocation applied to a task over time.
    NGMTask
    Represents an abstract scheduled task in the New Gantt Model (NGM).
    NGMTotalEffort
    Represents the intrinsic amount of work required for a task, expressed internally as seconds of person-time.
